rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions and has no bearing on the agency's annual school safety reporting requirements under Educ. Code §37.1088.
quote: Sec. 37.1088. AGENCY REPORT ON SCHOOL SAFETY.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text addresses school safety vulnerability reporting and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
